nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro White Titanium Device Frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.imageset/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.png
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 16 Pro in White Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent. Features a white/silver titanium metallic bezel, Dynamic Island cutout, and subtle camera bump outline. The iPhone 16 Pro represents Apple's 2024 flagship phone generation.

edges.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.imageset/iPhone 16 Pro - White Titanium.png
